title: poa pratensis subsp. sobolevskiana
intro: Poa pratensis subsp. sobolevskiana, also known as the smooth meadow-grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa pratensis subsp. sobolevskiana include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
